title: Minecraft 4th Dimensional (Read Desc.)
description: This mod adds a 4th dimension...and 5+ new materials, garitch, kilgorite, femderite, steel, and catria. 5+ new hostile and nuetral mobs, lots of new structures, 3 new armor sets, 5 new tool sets, garia, kilgorite, femderite, and catria.
body:
This mod adds a 4th dimension...and 5+ new materials, garitch, kilgorite, femderite, steel, and catria. 5+ new mobs, lots of new structures, 3 new armor sets, 5 new tool sets, garia, kilgorite, femderite, and catria, all found in 5 new biomes, lots of new wood types, all named the name after the 5 biomes, 3 new effects, and much, MUCH more!
To make the portal, first, you want to make a portal frame out of cracked polished blackstone bricks, which can be obtained from bastions or smelting polished blackstone bricks in a furnace or blast furnace. To make the _netherite & diamond_, you want to obtain 1 diamond block, 2 netherite blocks, and 2 endstone. Put the diamond block in slot 1 of a crafting grid, a netherite block in slot 5, endstone in slot 6, another netherite block in slot 8, and the final endstone in slot 9. In this dimension, you'll be able to find 5 new biomes, all with their own materials, advancements, and unique and almost alien-like colours! (As more things are added this description may not always be accurate) YT:[https://www.youtube.com/@meowserthecat](https://www.youtube.com/@meowserthecat)
